title: Boulder Co vlog 4/3/18: Roller Rode 1 hr 17.3 Mi

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about April 3rd in Boulder, a day he describes as unproductive and unmotivating. He ate junk food (candy, a burger, chips), felt physically sick from sugar and alcohol, had distractions he doesn't want to discuss, and worked on video playlists. He also fixed his Garmin and plans to reconnect it to Strava, and did a roller ride of 1 hour 17.3 miles.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: regrets eating candy, burger, and chips — felt sick afterward
dissatisfied with the day; distracted and lost motivation on video creation
optimistic about tomorrow; plans to sleep in and get back on track

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder vlog for yesterday, April 3rd, I didn't feel like doing anything

Kind of have to talk about it a little bit, so then I got kind of hungry, so I called
My mother, and she came and took me out to lunch, we went to Subway, Subway is under
New management, but I came back here, and I was doing some, creating some videos, creating
Little video playlists, it's the only thing I had the motivation to do, and then I bought
Candy, and I bought Jagermeister, the brew of the hunter, 19 arms and spices, so now I feel
Kind of sick, so I felt fine physically earlier, but now I feel kind of sick, when I ever do
It on sugar and alcohol, I kind of sweat and stuff, I'm kind of sick, and then it fucks
With my head, but yeah, so I won't do that for a while, it's just new beginnings, you know,
But yeah, I did manage to do an hour-long ride, I was riding, and starting to lose my motivation,
Because I wanted to, I wasn't happy with the videos I was looking at, I want to make better
Ones, so I was like, oh man, do I have to do another hour, so I looked down and it said
An hour, so, yeah, because I did get my Garmin fixed, yesterday my Garmin broke, so I called
The Garmin today, and I had to reconnect all of the things, I don't know why I did that,
I guess sometimes it does that, so, but now it works again, so, so I'm going to plug my
Ride up to Strava, when I open up, when I upload this video, yeah, and so tomorrow I'm going
To sleep in, and yeah, hopefully no more distractions, just got distracted, something that I don't want
To talk about, but yeah, so I'm ready to hit it tomorrow, ow, it's going to be awesome to feel
Better, I've been feeling really bad lately physically, okay, so anyways, I think that's
Enough, I just did my VLO, peace out.
